word: H6382 - פֶּלֶא - peleʼ - peh'-leh - Marvellous thing

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּלא

Transliteration: pele'

Phonetic: peh'-leh

BDB Definition:

  1. wonder, marvel
    1. wonder (extraordinary, hard to understand thing)
    2. wonder (of God's acts of judgment and redemption)

Origin: from H6381

TWOT entry: 1768a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
